description:
DOGRULAMA - Kalan 25 Marka | Buyuk marka sayfalarinin icerik dogrulamasini yap. Su markalarin mevcut icerikleri yeterli mi kontrol et:

alarko, aldea, atlantis, atlas, baylan, baymak, burak, caleffi, eraslan, grundfos, hakan-plastik, honeywell, jinko, panasonic, ph-mekanik, siemens, solimpeks, standart, teksan, toshiba, tse, varmeks, warmeks, wepomp, wilo, yelkenci

Kontrol listesi:
- Marka bilgisi (kurulus, merkez, sektor liderligi) yeterli mi?
- Teknik detay var mi (urun serileri, ozellikler)?
- Gül-tekin iliskisi aciklanmis mi?
- Hizmet sayfalarina link var mi?
- Gorsel eklenebilir mi?

Eksik bulunanlar icin duzeltme talimati ekle.

steps.name: Validate All 25 Brand Pages — Score Each Against 5 Criteria
Create Fix-Instruction Tasks for Uncovered Gaps

log.outcome: A thorough, well-structured specification for a read-only content validation of 25 large brand pages. All file references are verified against the actual codebase — every brand file exists, the JSON-embedded files (warmeks.mdx, baylan.mdx, ph-mekanik.mdx), the `.md` extension issue (varmeks.md), the teksan.mdx title mismatch, and the tse.mdx non-brand identity are all confirmed. The 5 criteria are clearly defined with verifiable pass/fail conditions, the scoring matrix template is concrete, and

log.action: queued — deferred for higher-priority queued task FN-002 (overlap)
